title: Star Wars Adventures 7: The Ghostling Children
content:
{{Top|rwm|imp|italics=1}} {{Otheruses|Star Wars Adventures 8}} {{Book |image=[[File:Adventures07-Book.png]] |title=''Star Wars Adventures 7:
The Ghostling Children'' |author=[[Dave Wolverton]] |cover artist= |illustrator= |editor= |publisher=[[Scholastic]] |early release= |release date=[[April]] [[2003]]''[[Star Wars Adventures 7: The Ghostling Children]]'' was released in a bundle with [[Star Wars Adventures Magazine 7|''Star Wars Adventure Magazine'' 7]], which was released in [[April]] [[2003]] |intl release= |rereleased= |media type=Paperback |pages= |isbn=0439458862 |isbn2= |isbn3= |timeline= |series=[[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'' (Scholastic)]] |preceded by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 6: The Warlords of Balmorra|The Warlords of Balmorra]]'' |followed by=''[[Star Wars Adventures 8: The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker|The Hunt for Anakin Skywalker]]'' }} '''''Star Wars Adventures 7: The Ghostling Children''''' was the seventh installment of [[Scholastic]]'s [[Star Wars Adventures (Scholastic)|''Star Wars Adventures'']] series. This book is a reprint of ''[[Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children]]''. ==Publisher's summary== '''Now flashback to the time before Episode I''.' ''The Ghostling children live on a beautiful, isolated world, safe from harm…until they are captured by an evil trader. Soon they find themselves on the harsh planet of Tatooine, about to be sold to the terrifying Gardulla the Hutt''. ''Their only hope of survival is a young slave named Anakin and his friends.'' ''Can the Ghostlings be freed?'' ==Media== ===Cover gallery=== File:Adventures07-Book.png|Novel cover File:Adventures07-GameBook.jpg|Game Book cover File:Adventures07-GameBook-Full.jpg|Game Book cover ==Appearances== {{:Episode I Adventures 5: The Ghostling Children}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{ScholasticAdventuresNav}} {{Interlang |ka=ვარსკვლავური ომები: თავგადასავლები 7: აჩრდილი ბავშვები }} [[Category:Star Wars Adventures books|Adventures 07]]
